creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 180687
QA LOG for textproc/sansi

QA LOG for textproc/sansi

Please note:
please disregard the error (notice) emitted, as it's a false positive
"Notice: You have some Perl modules as dependencies but you do not have devel/p5-Module-CoreList installed, the perlcore QA check gets better results when using it, especially with older Perl versions."

man(1) and perldoc(1) both tell me that Module::CoreList as
well as perlcore are both installed -- I actually use them.
Should I file a pr(1) against the ports framework?
